articles.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
articles.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.

articles.title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
articles.summary: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.

articles.title: Election information and safeguards in 2026
articles.summary: Ahead of global elections, we’re helping people access information, supporting cyber defenders, and increasing AI transparency

articles.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
articles.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.

articles.title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

articles.title: OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
articles.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.
